settings.text: A curated wine list, craft cocktails, and seasonal small plates made for sharing.

settings.title: Wine
settings.description: Our by-the-glass selection rotates weekly. Ask your server what's open tonight.

settings.name: Sancerre, Domaine Vacheron
settings.description: Loire Valley, France — crisp, mineral, white flowers

settings.name: Albariño, Pazo de Señoráns
settings.description: Rías Baixas, Spain — citrus, stone fruit, saline finish

settings.name: Côtes du Rhône, E. Guigal
settings.description: Rhône, France — dark fruit, spice, medium body

settings.name: Barolo, Pio Cesare
settings.description: Piedmont, Italy — rose, tar, cherry. Bold and structured

settings.name: Malbec, Catena Zapata
settings.description: Mendoza, Argentina — plum, dark chocolate, velvet tannins

settings.name: Rosé, Château d'Esclans
settings.description: Provence, France — pale pink, strawberry, dry and refreshing

settings.name: The Corkwell Negroni
settings.description: Gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, orange peel. Our house version with a barrel-aged twist

settings.name: Lavender Spritz
settings.description: Prosecco, elderflower liqueur, lavender bitters, soda. Light and floral

settings.name: Smoke & Honey Old Fashioned
settings.description: Bourbon, honey syrup, smoked with applewood. Served over a single large ice cube

settings.name: Fig Manhattan
settings.description: Rye whiskey, fig-infused sweet vermouth, Angostura, brandied cherry

settings.title: Small Plates
settings.description: Designed for sharing — order a few and let the table decide.

settings.name: Charcuterie Board
settings.description: Rotating selection of cured meats, house pickles, mustard, grilled bread

settings.name: Cheese Selection
settings.description: Three or five cheeses, honeycomb, dried fruit, marcona almonds

settings.name: Wood-Fired Flatbread
settings.description: Roasted garlic, taleggio, truffle honey, fresh thyme

settings.name: Burrata & Tomato
settings.description: Creamy burrata, heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, balsamic reduction

settings.name: Marinated Olives
settings.description: Castelvetrano and Kalamata, citrus zest, chili, fresh herbs

settings.name: Steak Frites
settings.description: Hanger steak, herb butter, hand-cut fries, béarnaise

settings.text: Our full bottle list runs 200+ labels deep — from everyday pours to special-occasion splurges. Ask your server for the book, or let our sommelier guide you. We promise to meet you where you are.
